_demo_notice: Fictional sample data. Not based on any real customer.

records.report_summary: Beanlight Tea operates ~120 mall-counter stores and wants to launch a branded WeChat mini-program where members can pre-order, pay, and earn loyalty points. They have an existing POS but no online ordering. They want to know whether we can help them ship a payment-enabled mini-program in 6-8 weeks.
known_requirements: Branded WeChat mini-program for pre-order pickup
Member identity tied to existing phone-number-based loyalty program
Daily settlement reporting for finance team
records.current_system: Self-built POS deployed in-store. No e-commerce platform. No prior mini-program. Finance reconciles daily via Excel exports.
records.transaction_scale: Roughly 60,000 orders per day across all stores during peak season. Average ticket ~28 RMB.
records.expected_solution: A WeChat mini-program with payment that the customer can launch under their own corporate WeChat Pay merchant account, with daily reconciliation files matching their finance format.
records.raw_notes: Sales call notes (paraphrased): Customer is decisive, has already registered a WeChat Pay merchant account but has not done any technical integration. They want to keep their POS as the source of truth for in-store transactions. The CFO is the budget owner and is sensitive to monthly platform fees. They asked specifically whether we could integrate via API rather than using a packaged storefront, because they want to control the UI.
